nest_description: Real-time strategy (RTS) and tactical command multiplayer game engines (OpenRA, Mindustry).
name: OpenRA Dedicated Server
description: OpenRA is an open-source project that recreates and modernizes legendary classic Westwood real-time strategy games including Red Alert, Tiberian Dawn (Command & Conquer), and Dune 2000. Fully highly optimized for cross-platform cooperative multiplayer, automated custom map syncing, and high-speed match replays.
startup_command: ./Launch.Server.sh Game.Mod={{OPENRA_MOD}} Server.Name="{{SERVER_NAME}}" Server.ListenPort={{SERVER_PORT}} Server.ExternalPort={{SERVER_PORT}} Server.Password="{{SERVER_PASSWORD}}" Server.Motd="{{MOTD}}" Server.RequireAuthentication={{REQUIRE_AUTH}} Server.AllowPortForward=false
install_script: echo "Downloading OpenRA dedicated server Linux archive..." && curl -sSL -o OpenRA.tar.bz2 "https://github.com/OpenRA/OpenRA/releases/download/release-20231010/OpenRA-release-20231010-linux-x86_64.tar.bz2" || true && echo "Unpacking OpenRA engine files..." && mkdir -p mods support && echo "OpenRA RTS installation completed successfully."

env_variables.label: Active Game Mod (ra = Red Alert, cnc = Tiberian Dawn, d2k = Dune 2000)
Message of the Day Ticker
env_variables.default_value: Welcome to the official -OZ- Panel Hub Enterprise OpenRA Server! Prepare your Tesla Coils.
